title: Cattleyopsis rosea
taxonomy: Cattleyopsis rosea is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The genus Cattleyopsis is part of the subtribe Catasetinae and tribe Catasetinae within the orchid family. The classification of Cattleyopsis rosea is further divided into the binomial nomenclature of Cattleyopsis rosea, which is used to identify the species. This classification system helps in the identification and organization of various plant species.

intro: Cattleyopsis rosea, commonly known as Mexican Orchid or Cattleya Rosea, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Mexico and Central America.
